gt_sql: SELECT t2.name, t1.max_count FROM League AS t2 JOIN (SELECT league_id, MAX(cnt) AS max_count FROM (SELECT league_id, COUNT(id) AS cnt FROM Match GROUP BY league_id) AS subquery) AS t1 ON t1.league_id = t2.id
pred_sql:
SELECT l.name, COUNT(m.league_id) as max_count
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY max_count DESC
LIMIT 1
question: Give the name of the league with the highest matches of all time and how many matches were played in the said league.
